phases.title: Grooming & Sprint Planning
tasks: Check if every backlog requirement is available.
Check the design in Figma, ensuring the design covers the defined requirements.
Provide feedback on potentially missing requirements or designs.
Ensure positive and negative cases are handled.
Create test cases in Squash for backlogs/requirements that have been included in the sprint.
Identify the impact of enhancements/improvements (both existing and resulting conditions).
Production Planning: Create Test Plan and Release Document.

phases.title: API Contract
tasks: Ensure the API covers the requirements/backlogs.
Ensure positive and negative API responses are covered (codes: 2xx, 4xx, 5xx).
Ensure the API has schemas and examples.
Ensure data-testid (FE) is implemented (nice to have).

phases.title: Development
tasks: Create QA Subtasks, minimally for Test Case creation. Example: [QA] Create Login feature Test Case.
Create test cases in Squash based on designs and requirements/backlogs.
Ensure development flow aligns with the planning.
Analyze the flow to find possible edge cases not covered by requirements or design.
Create API automation in Postman based on the API contract (nice to have).
Ensure test data is ready.

phases.title: In QA
tasks: Ensure features have been built and deployed to the Dev server.
Validate developer tasks against requirements/backlogs: Check UI, API, and Integration.
Execute the test cases created in Squash.
Reject subtasks if they don't meet the requirements, providing test documentation.
Create a bug task if out-of-sprint feature bugs are found, providing test documentation.
Performance testing for service and frontend (nice to have).

phases.title: Prod Preparation
tasks: Ensure features have been built and deployed to the Staging server.
Perform Regression Testing and update test cases in Squash on Staging ENV.
Record all changelogs/version updates in the release notes.
Run Postman API test folder based on release/all features (if test scripts are defined).
Prepare UAT/SIT documentation and include signed approvals (if conditional requirements apply).
3rd party performance testing (if needed).

phases.title: After Prod
tasks: Ensure features have been built and deployed to the Production server.
Perform smoke testing when features are released.
Reproduce bugs upon receiving issue reports.
Report hotfixes when finding or receiving issue reports.
Update versions if hotfixes are deployed.
Conduct post-production evaluation.
Monitor services.
